---
label: "Architecture Documentation"
icon: "📄"
---

## Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

The capstone deliverable is an **Architecture Decision Document** — the single artifact that tells your story to interviewers and stakeholders.

### ADR Template

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<AnalogyBox emoji="📋" title="MDM Architecture Decision Record">
If you've written architecture decisions for SAP S/4HANA or Informatica MDM projects, ADRs follow the same structure: Context (why), Decision (what), Consequences (trade-offs), Alternatives (what else we considered). The format is familiar — the domain is new.
</AnalogyBox>

<SeeItInRe3 text="The Re³ ARCHITECTURE.md file follows this exact pattern — documenting why specific orchestration patterns, model providers, and agent roles were chosen." />
